overall.description: Static first-person view from inside a canvas tent in Red Dead Redemption 2, showing a flickering campfire at dusk with rocky mountains and sparse vegetation in the background. The scene depicts a peaceful campsite with the game's HUD visible in the corner, offering SLEEP/EAT/PLAY options.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite at mountain overlook during dusk

agents.ego_description: resting inside a tent at a campsite, observing the campfire and surrounding mountain landscape

active campfire with flickering orange flames and glowing embers
vertical wooden pole supporting the tent structure
large rock formations and mountain peaks silhouetted against the sunset sky
sparse desert shrubs and small trees on the hillside
purple and orange gradient sky with scattered clouds at sunset

segments.scene_description: A completely static first-person view from inside a tent looking out at a campfire during dusk. The canvas tent walls frame the scene on both sides, with a support pole in the center. Beyond the flickering fire, rocky mountains rise against a colorful sunset sky while sparse vegetation dots the landscape. No movement or action occurs except for the natural flickering of the campfire flames.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from within a canvas tent, capturing a serene campsite as the light of dusk settles over a mountainous wilderness. It begins with the view framed by the tent's fabric walls and a central support pole, looking out toward a flickering campfire. As the flames dance in the foreground, the gaze extends past the fire to rocky mountains silhouetted against a colorful sunset sky. The scene remains still, allowing the natural movement of the fire and the fading light to define the peaceful atmosphere of the landscape.
